user_query:
You're commissioned to craft an artist statement and three artwork descriptions in the Network Spirituality aesthetic for an upcoming micro-exhibition.

Please read these files first:
- input/artworks.csv — list of works with fields: title, year, medium, dimensions, required_keywords (semicolon-separated)
- input/constraints.yaml — style rules: banned words, word-counts, and example phrases to incorporate

Deliverables:
1) Write output/statement.md — 120–200 words; embody the Network Spirituality voice; include the exact string "The Wired" at least once; incorporate at least one phrase from example_phrases in input/constraints.yaml; include at least one of the aesthetic anchors listed under statement.must_include_one_of; end with a separate final line that begins exactly with "Prophecy:" followed by a one-sentence prophecy.

2) Write output/descriptions.jsonl — one JSON object per line, in the same order as input/artworks.csv, with keys: title, year (as integer), medium, dimensions, description (50–120 words). In each description, use all required_keywords for that work verbatim, and include at least one word from description.must_include_one_of in input/constraints.yaml.

Notes:
- Do not use any banned words listed in input/constraints.yaml.
- Keep everything in English.
- Be vivid, garish, and tender; do not explain the aesthetic — embody it.
- Ensure output/descriptions.jsonl is valid JSONL (one compact JSON object per line, no trailing commas).
